name: treatment-plans
tagline: Generates concise LaTeX/PDF medical treatment plans (1-6 pages) with SMART goals, HIPAA guidance, and specialty-specific templates.
verdict: Thorough clinical-writing skill with concrete SMART-goal and LaTeX examples across six specialties, but it contradicts itself on whether AI figure generation is mandatory or optional, gives no negative-trigger scope guidance, ships a 53KB monolithic SKILL.md, and never checks for LaTeX/Python tooling before invoking it.

highlights.summary: tlmgr install nejm/jama/bmj/tcolorbox/tikz etc. are unpinned; well-known official TeX Live packages but no version pins.
No 'NOT for'/exclusion guidance anywhere; body only says 'Prioritizes brevity and clinical actionability' with no out-of-scope pointers.
Frontmatter marks OPENROUTER_API_KEY 'required_for: optional features' but body states figure generation is 'MANDATORY: Every treatment plan MUST include at least 1 AI-generated figure'.
